summary: Excellent soundboard capture of an early‑80s show, highlighted by smooth second‑set transitions and classic Dead fun.
review: Both reviewers rave about the balanced, crystal‑clear recording supplied by Ohr Weinberg, calling it one of the most perfect auds available. The performance itself is praised for its enjoyable vibe and especially the first four tunes of the second set, whose transitions are described as “really great,” even if the era’s typical quirks (“warts”) remain.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed, highly positive reviews emphasize superb recording quality and an enjoyable show despite minor period‑specific imperfections.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced, crisp, and perfect‑sounding audio as highlighted by multiple reviewers; no noted flaws in the mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note especially strong transitions between the first four tunes of the second set, describing the overall vibe as fun and engaging despite typical early‑80s “warts.”
